creator: jbeich@FreeBSD.org
text:
This update appears to carry less breaking changes but let's confirm via exp-run.

https://ssl.icu-project.org/repos/icu/tags/release-60-1/icu4c/APIChangeReport.html
https://abi-laboratory.pro/tracker/objects_report/icu4c/59_1/60_1/report.html

### /usr/local/etc/poudriere.d/PR223373-make.conf ###
OPTIONS_SET += ICU UNICODE
databases_sqlite3_UNSET += ICU
